title: Benjia 40th Birthday Decoration, Bday Card Gift Guest Signing Book for Woman Man, Born in 1986 UK Poster Guestbook, 40 Years Old Signature Board, Black Gold Birthday Party Decor for Mum Dad
features: Celebrate Golden Milestone: This charming 40th birthday decoration guest book takes you back to 1986 with fascinating UK trivia, from music and movies to prices and politics, making it a nostalgic centerpiece for any 40th birthday party

Jumbo Size & Black Gold Design: Crafted with a pearl-matte finish and a black cover adorned with gold foil stamping, the giant 40th birthday greeting card board sized 26.6 x 21.7 cm (44 x 26.6 cm when unfolded), offering ample room for guests to leave their warmest wishes while adding a touch of luxury to any 40th birthday celebration. Inside pages are made of high-grade pearl paper, not easily soiled

A Unique Keepsake: More than just a happy 40 years old birthday sign in card book, this beautifully designed piece doubles as a display-worthy memento, perfect for framing after the celebrations, capturing your special moments beautifully

Spark Conversations: With its retro-inspired design and fun facts, this born in 1986 birthday signature poster gift is guaranteed to get your guests chatting and reminiscing about the good old days, making it a perfect gift and decoration choice for your special event

Perfect Gift: Whether it’s for your mum, dad, partner, grandma, grandpa, aunt, uncle, a 40-year-old woman, man or friends, this funny 40th birthday guestbook gift is a wonderfully personal way to mark their 40th birthday in retro style
